block_16: Most Profitable Trade of the Week
block_42:
There is an opinion that novice traders give up on trading when they bear losses.
Nevertheless, a survey among 400 qualified Forex traders revealed that many of them keep on trading even after bearing major losses. So, overconfidence is a common scourge in the world of trading and investing.
